issue_title: fix(studio): constrain scene hierarchy pane width and enable horizontal scroll for deeply nested tree
issue_body_preview:
fix(studio): constrain scene hierarchy pane width and enable horizontal scroll for deeply nested tree


Im sorry I dont really understand the changeset rule for users and how to contribute, am I allowed to do this PR? Sorry if Im not, first time doing a PR ever
test_description_zh: 在 Studio 的场景层级面板中，创建或打开一个具有深层嵌套节点的场景树，观察层级面板的宽度表现以及当树节点层级很深时是否出现水平滚动条。
expected_result_zh: 场景层级面板的宽度应被约束在合理范围内，不会因为深层嵌套的树节点而无限撑宽面板。当树节点层级较深、内容超出面板宽度时，应出现水平滚动条，用户可以通过水平滚动查看被截断的深层嵌套节点内容。
